mapper.sql: select id, template_code, template_version, name, description, template_type, applicable_object_type, cast(chapter_tree_json as char) as chapter_tree_json, cast(validation_rules_json as char) as validation_rules_json, cast(default_generator_params_json as char) as default_generator_params_json, status, is_default, effective_from, effective_to, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from t1_dossier_template
mapper.insert: insert into t1_dossier_template (id, template_code, template_version, name, description, template_type, applicable_object_type, chapter_tree_json, validation_rules_json, default_generator_params_json, status, is_default, effective_from, effective_to, created_by, updated_by) values (#{id}, #{templateCode}, #{templateVersion}, #{name}, #{description}, #{templateType}, #{applicableObjectType}, #{chapterTreeJson}, #{validationRulesJson}, #{defaultGeneratorParamsJson}, #{status}, #{isDefault}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.delete:
delete from t1_dossier_template where id in
#{templateId}
mapper.update: update t1_dossier_template set is_default = 0, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = sysdate(6) where template_type = #{templateType} and applicable_object_type = #{applicableObjectType} and is_default = 1
update t1_dossier_template set is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = sysdate(6) where id = #{id}
update t1_dossier_template set status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = sysdate(6) where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select column_name as columnName, data_type as dataType, column_comment as columnComment, column_key as columnKey, is_nullable as nullable from information_schema.columns where table_schema = database() and table_name = #{tableName} order by ordinal_position
